title: corydalis latiloba
intro: Corydalis latiloba, also known as Yan Hu Suo or Chinese Corydalis, is a plant species in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is native to China and other parts of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content, particularly dehydrocorybulbine (DHCB). The medicinal properties of Corydalis latiloba have been shown to provide health benefits such as pain relief, improved sleep quality, and reduced anxiety and stress levels. Corydalis latiloba can be prepared as an herbal supplement in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions.
